subnarratives.subnarrative_name: CC: Criticism of climate policies: Climate policies are ineffective
subnarratives.evidence_quote: Garcetti joined a U.S. Department of Transportation presentation on “high-quality urban transportation infrastructure,” though L.A.’s infrastructure is not widely considered “high-quality.” A proposed high-speed rail between L.A. and San Francisco has been largely canceled, and current passenger rail service from L.A. to San Diego has been suspended because of a potential landslide hazard.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly contrasts the claimed goals of climate policy (high-quality, sustainable infrastructure) with the reality of failures and cancellations in Los Angeles, suggesting the policies are not achieving their intended outcomes.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: CC: Criticism of climate policies: Climate policies have negative impact on the economy
subnarratives.evidence_quote: Garcetti’s “Green New Deal” calls for shuttering natural gas plants; it has been opposed by public works unions, and lost the only serious electoral challenge it faced in a 2019 city council race.
subnarratives.reasoning: The quote frames the climate policy (Green New Deal) as facing opposition from labor unions and electoral defeat, implying it has negative consequences for workers and lacks public support, which are economic and political impacts.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: CC: Criticism of climate policies: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: Los Angeles Mayor Eric Garcetti joined a “global coalition of mayors” at a summit on climate change this week in Buenos Aires, Argentina, burning fossil fuels on an international flight rather than attending remotely and attending to pressing issues at home.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote criticizes the climate policy actor (the mayor) for hypocrisy and poor prioritization (flying to a summit instead of addressing local problems), which supports the parent narrative of criticizing climate policies but does not fit the specific definitions of ineffectiveness, economic harm, or profit motive.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: CC: Criticism of institutions and authorities: Criticism of political organizations and figures
subnarratives.evidence_quote: White Garcetti was away, Los Angeles continued to struggle with the high crime and homelessness that have come to define his legacy, as well as a crisis in the City Council triggered by racist comments from City Council members within Garcetti’s party.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly criticizes Mayor Eric Garcetti's performance and legacy, focusing on domestic failures (crime, homelessness) and a political scandal within his party, thereby discrediting him as a political figure.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: CC: Criticism of institutions and authorities: Other
